model_1_major_repairs.description: Sample of two-year owners of automobile model 1; 53 out of 400 reported needing major repairs (>$500) within the first 2 years. This variable and model_2_major_repairs represent the same measurement (proportion needing major repairs) across two different automobile models.

model_2_major_repairs.description: Sample of two-year owners of automobile model 2; 78 out of 500 reported needing major repairs (>$500) within the first 2 years. This variable and model_1_major_repairs represent the same measurement (proportion needing major repairs) across two different automobile models.
